description: Student never interacted with the scene-entry UI — scene_entry_scoring_result=null and scene_entry_dict is empty. Both scene_safety and pat_assessment have scene_entry_credited=true, which should flag them as LIKELY_MISSED (student clearly skipped mandatory pre-entry steps). Current code returns EVALUATE for both because the classification falls through to the P4 EVALUATE fallback — the 'protocol_indicated' guard on LIKELY_MISSED is not triggered without an 'evidence' dict. Tests the gap between current EVALUATE behavior and target LIKELY_MISSED for scene-entry-gated actions.

o2_nrb.label: High-flow O2 via NRB mask (15 LPM)

submitted_docs.dmist: D: 8yo male, dispatched for difficulty breathing. M: Asthma history. I: O2 NRB, albuterol SVN. S: SpO2 83%. T: Transporting to Pediatric ED.
submitted_docs.narrative: C: Dispatched to 8-year-old presenting with asthma. H: 2-hour wheeze onset. A: SpO2 83%. R: O2 NRB, albuterol SVN. T: ALS transport to Pediatric ED.
